import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useCart } from '../context/AuthContext'; // wait this is wrong context import { useCart as useCartState } from '../context/CartContext'; import { Trash2, ArrowRight, ShoppingBag, Minus, Plus } from 'lucide-react'; const Cart = () => { const { cartItems, addToCart, removeFromCart, itemsPrice, shippingPrice, taxPrice, totalPrice } = useCartState(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleCheckout = () => { navigate('/login?redirect=/checkout'); }; if (cartItems.length === 0) { return (

Your cart is empty

Looks like you haven't added anything to your cart yet. Explore our products and find something you love.

Start Shopping
); } return (

Shopping Cart

{cartItems.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.qty, 0)} items in your cart
{/* Cart Items */}
{cartItems.map((item) => (
{item.name} ${item.price.toFixed(2)}
{item.qty}
${(item.price * item.qty).toFixed(2)}
))}
{/* Summary */}

Subtotal ${itemsPrice.toFixed(2)}
Estimated Shipping ${shippingPrice.toFixed(2)}

); }; export default Cart;
